title: Create: Diesel Generators
description: A mod that adds Diesel Generators, Crude Oil Refinery and much more to the create mod.
body: ### Content: - Chemical Turrets - Chemical Sprayers - Pumpjacks - Burners - Bulk Fermenters - Oil Barrels - Canisters - Track Layer Bags - Gasoline, Diesel and other fuels - Hammers, Wire Cutters - Engines - Engine upgrades - Compression Molding, Casting - Lighters - Chip Wood, Asphalt, Andesite Girders, Sheet Metal Panels - Cement ### Customization: Check the [github wiki](https://github.com/george8188625/Create-Diesel-Generators/wiki/Customization) ### Join our discord server! https://discord.gg/pUgaSXcGEQ ### Credits - The title logo by DAXXXZ_NORT_2077 - Sound effects: ['Engine'](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/engine-47745/) by 'Eponn (Freesound)', from Pixabay
